what_changed: Multispectral imagery band ratio translated into a raw spectral anomaly report flagging 73ha NDVI deviation in sector BR-AM-441
Spectral anomaly of 73ha exceeds 50ha alert threshold; agency notification triggered via anomaly-threshold-ruleset-v2
Inspection request entered 14-day scheduling backlog; field visit deferred to 2026-03-25 by inspection-scheduling-queue
Autonomous ground sensor array generated structured deforestation report without human attribution; source unidentifiable by observing system
Joint signature of agency officer and field inspector required by enforcement-authorization-protocol-v4 to issue enforcement order above 60ha threshold
Logging operation cerrado-timber-operations-4412 suspended by enforcement order; equipment access revoked pending investigation
Enforcement case exceeds regional agency jurisdiction (>60ha); redirected to Ministry of Environment via inter-agency-escalation-protocol
Oral testimony from community monitor translated to written documented report by ngo-documentation-protocol-v2; spatial coordinates added, identity anonymized on request
Community report amplified into formal satellite re-task request; alert-routing-protocol matched report to active satellite pass schedule for 2026-03-12 window
Legal challenge filed but entered 45-day docket queue; federal-court-filing-registry assigned hearing date 2026-04-25
Multiple community accounts aggregated into structured impact assessment by testimony-aggregation-protocol-v3; no single source attributable — testimony is collective
Legal challenge admitted by tribunal-admissibility-framework; documented 73ha loss meets 50ha standing threshold for expedited hearing
Community complaint escalated from national tribunal to UNFF complaint mechanism; national legal remedy deemed insufficient by un-forest-complaint-mechanism
73ha deforestation triggers invalidation of 14,600 carbon credits in VCS project 2847; credit loss exceeds 5% buffer-pool threshold in vcs-permanence-buffer-protocol
Broker notification entered 48-hour reconciliation cycle; registry-reconciliation-scheduler queues batched notifications — broker verde-carbon-ltd not notified until 2026-03-13
Trading in VCS-2847 credits suspended; market temporarily blocked pending confirmation of deforestation extent and buffer-pool recalculation
Automated reconciliation engine generated market-correction-report without human attribution; source is the registry system itself, not a named actor
Invalidated VCS-2847 credits redirected to verified reforestation project mata-viva-0031 via buffer-pool-replacement-protocol; buyer contracts reissued with new project reference

Satellite deforestation data and carbon-registry invalidation data jointly amplified through inter-agency-data-fusion-protocol into verified enforcement report; two independent threads converge as corroborating evidence

UNFF article-5 obligation translated into dual mandate: national-forest-agency must report under REDD+ protocol; carbon-registry-auditor must verify credit removals under Paris Agreement article-5-implementation-guide
Landsat-9 retasked via satellite-retasking-protocol; second overpass delivers updated imagery showing deforestation expanded from 73ha to 112ha in sector BR-AM-441
Updated imagery processed by change-detection-model-v3; deforestation extent updated from 73ha to 112ha, exceeding previous measurement threshold by 53%
Updated extent report received by national-forest-agency; case escalated to Ministry of Environment via escalation-protocol-ibama due to expanded deforestation area
Forest protection tribunal first hearing scheduled; community report and advocacy letter jointly triggered scheduling via tribunal-scheduling-system
Community legal aid secured from pro-bono network via automated matching; source unidentifiable — assignment generated by pro-bono-matching-network without human intermediary
verde-carbon-ltd receives delayed broker notification; 48-hour reconciliation cycle completed via reconciliation-batch-scheduler — notification delayed from initial invalidation on 2026-03-11
Market correction report triggers reassessment request for VCS-2847 audit via audit-review-protocol; carbon-registry-auditor redirects review to buffer pool recalculation
Ministry of Environment receives escalated deforestation case via inter-agency-transfer-system; escalation memo translated into formal ministry case record
Inter-ministerial protocol triggers joint working group formation; enforcement order and ministry case jointly amplified into coordinated multi-agency response
Joint verification report updated with new satellite extent data; working group output and updated scan blocked from release pending final inter-agency sign-off
Third Landsat-9 overpass via automated-overpass-scheduler confirms 112ha deforestation extent unchanged; no further expansion detected since 2026-03-14 measurement
Confirmation scan processed by change-detection-model-v3; no further expansion detected — extent stabilisation confirmed at 112ha, threshold for escalation not breached further
Ministry of Environment issues formal conservation order via environmental-decree-system; references enforcement-order-br-am-441 from day 1 and ministry case as joint basis for order

UNFF complaint formally acknowledged via unff-case-registration-system after 7-day processing delay; case number assigned, translating community complaint into official international treaty-body record
Community reforestation fund established via climate-fund-allocation-protocol; source unidentifiable — donor matching automated, no single funder attributable to this allocation
Buffer-pool recalculation complete via buffer-pool-recalculation-engine; mata-viva-0031 replacement credits certified, threshold for re-entry into voluntary carbon market met
verde-carbon-ltd contract reissuance confirmed via broker-contract-reissuance-protocol; trading redirected from invalidated VCS-2847 credits to certified mata-viva-0031 replacement credits

Paris Agreement REDD+ compliance report submitted via redd-plus-reporting-framework; conservation order, updated verification report, and stable extent confirmation jointly amplified into multi-agency signatory report
International treaty body publishes precedent notice via unff-precedent-registry based on UNFF case br-2026-0043; amplifies individual national case into international normative reference

Final cross-thread status blocked pending acknowledgement by all parties; conservation order and REDD+ report jointly submitted, case-closure-protocol holds enforcement-closure-report until all signatories confirm
